EmailTemplate.description: Response to RAF chase from referrer (for old RAF process).
EmailTemplate.name: RAF - Chaser (old process)
EmailTemplate.subject: Your RAF Referral
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
You recently referred your friend to us, but we have been unable to get in touch with them.
If they are still interested in purchasing a policy with us, please can you ask them to call us on 01242 808 740.
Kind regards,
{!User.FirstName} Customer Service Team
E: customersupport@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808 740
